response.text:
REJECT

rationale: My battery has only 0.7 hours autonomy remaining during a 10.5-hour outage; I cannot spare 0.5 kWh even at normal urgency without risking complete depletion, and r3c4's SoC (0.46) is above my minimum survival threshold (0.6 would apply to sharing, but I must prioritize my own critical reserve first).

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r3c4. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'normal'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.46 below share threshold; requesting energy via geographic circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.6, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: My battery is critically depleted with only 0.7 hours of autonomy remaining; the aggregator must supply bulk energy immediately or I will not survive the 10.5-hour outage..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
